2389680.name: Cannonpistol
2389680.description:
Crafted with passion out of Smokeback 's chaos mind a heart-pounding side-scrolling boss rush shooter that blends retro-inspired design with explosive run-and-boom action packed with adrenaline-pumping combat. Set in the richly original world of Odspiken, this isn’t just a game—it’s an immersive adventure!

Odspiken has been shattered into shineless world of darkness...Once thrived in harmony, as a glittering golden paradise with shiny skies…until the beasts descended from the sky like storms, devouring night and day, draining the lands of all its shine one by one, we fell to their gold driven hunger of the Goldchest beasts!

Time tested and reshaped us to fight back until only one Hunter remained. In our darkest hour, hope ignited with the last sacred ore left we forged a weapon that became our symbol to reclaim what was lost, the first Cannonpistol.

Forge your own path and dive into the mesmerizing world of Odspiken—a realm with secrets, untold stories to discover in the echoes of  shine lost lands . From the treacherous depths of the Cavemendie mines to the shadowy expanse of the Darkrest forests above Fognest and all the way to Solomonz peak .

Every Hunter has a purpose, and in this world, it’s simple: hunt and take down every last Goldchest beast! Face beasts unlike anything you’ve ever seen, test your skills, and prove your growth as the last Goldchest Hunter.Fight fiercely, rise to the challenge combining your attacks and the hunt ends when the last Goldchest beast falls in Odspiken!

Key to victory lies in your gear! Power up your cannonpistol, explosive cannonballs, and unlock game-changing trinkets, enchanted gear, and magical upgrades to dominate the hunt.Make sure to visit the one and only Nozzedim shop of tools to sharpen your edge and turn the tide in your favor for every hunt. Because every Goldchest beast you face will wish you came unprepared!

Unleash your creativity and forge your own identity crafting the ultimate Goldchest Hunter! Dive into levels of customization,sculpt every detail from your face and skin texture to jaw-dropping outfits. Design a Hunter as unique as your playstyle Whether you want to be a rugged wilderness , a sleek dark style, or a radiant hunter, the power is in your hands!

                                                 The Hunt begins Bring back the lost shiny skies
